prompt:
Scene:
Same square top-down studio product shot as the reference image: cream paper on a warm white table, soft side lighting, visible paper texture, and the same zine poster composition. Preserve the reference poster's crop and layout with the shop facade, bicycle, angular clouds, two figures, pseudo-title band, and bottom pseudo-caption bars in the same positions.

Subject:
Transform the reference into a black key-plate overprint and ink-drag study. The black ink layer is slightly too heavy, with pressure-darkened keylines, small drag streaks in the direction of paper travel, and tiny black smears near dense linework. The fluorescent pink and cobalt blue plates remain visible underneath, but the black plate partially overpowers details around the shop window, bicycle spokes, figure outlines, and pseudo-title shapes.

Important details:
The print should look like a real overloaded Risograph pass, not dirt on a digital file. Show ink sitting on uncoated paper, slight feathering into fibers, roller bands, tiny void speckles, and black overprint changing color where it crosses pink and blue. Keep the poster layout and registration marks readable as shapes, but all pseudo-text must remain non-readable. The final artifact should feel flawed yet collectible.

Use case:
Fourth image in a reference-dependent Risograph Misprint series, preserving the base poster while emphasizing heavy black overprint and ink drag.

Constraints:
PRESERVE the reference image composition, paper crop, zine layout, subject placement, and square format. No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no real brand marks, no full-color CMYK, no digital grunge overlay, no changed poster subject, no human hands.
title: Black Overprint Drag
description: The reference zine poster with heavy black key-plate overprint, ink drag, and roller-pressure defects.

generation.runner_notes: Use the reference poster to preserve layout while adding heavy black overprint and ink drag.

en.title: Black Overprint Drag
en.description: The reference zine poster with heavy black key-plate overprint, ink drag, and roller-pressure defects.

alt.en: A Risograph zine poster where heavy black ink creates drag streaks and dense overprint.
alt.zh-CN: 一张 Risograph zine 海报，厚重黑墨形成拖墨条纹和浓重叠印。
